<|user|>
Saan pwedeng bumili ng Novolin R at magkano ito?</s>
<|assistant|>
Sa Pilipinas, ang Insulin Human Regular (Humulin R, Novolin R, Insulin Human Regular Generic) ay may halagang: Generic ₱400.00 – ₱700.00; Branded N/A. Mabibili sa Mercury Drug, Rose Pharmacy, Generics Pharmacy, at Botika ng Barangay.

Is it safe to combine Micozole and Diflucan?</s>
<|assistant|>
Taking Miconazole (topical) and Fluconazole together may cause an interaction. Monitor for increased side effects. Always consult a pharmacist or doctor before combining medicines.

Anong over-the-counter na gamot ang pwede sa hyperacidity?</s>
<|assistant|>
Para sa kondisyon na ito, maaaring gamitin ang Aluminum Hydroxide / Magnesium Hydroxide (Maalox, Kremil-S, Antacid Generic). Standard adult dosage: 1–2 tablets or 5–10 mL suspension after meals and at bedtime.. Paano inumin: Chew tablets thoroughly before swallowing. Shake suspension well before use.. Karaniwang side effects: constipation (aluminum), diarrhea (magnesium), chalky taste. Approximate presyo sa Pilipinas: Generic ₱3.00 – ₱6.00, Branded ₱80.00 – ₱150.00. Available sa Mercury Drug, Rose Pharmacy, Generics Pharmacy, at Botika ng Barangay.
